name: Key Lime Pie II
recipeInstructions:
1 Pre heat oven to 350 degrees.
2 In a large bowl beat the egg yolks and condensed milk.
3 Stir in lime juice.
4 Pour into shell and bake for 12 minutes.
5 Cool. Chill.
6 Serve with whipped cream topping.
7 NOTE: You can make a meringue topping for the pie using leftover egg whites. Beat 4 egg whites until stiff, gradually add 1/2 cup sugar. Top off UNCOOKED pie with meringue mixture and bake for 15 minutes instead. (Recipe from Bordens Easy Entertaining Cookbook)
